name: The Haunted Ride - A VR Horror Series

reviews.review_description: Lo peor del mundo,  BAD BAD BAD SHAME DEVS COMO DE COLOCADOSSSS FULL HIGHNYOU MUSTBBE EVEN TO DO THIS.

This video was very good. The only problem was that (PART-3) stops in the middle of the video and goes back to the home screen. This happens when the man says you are going to die. I tried to redownload 3 times, same in all 3 tries. Hope for a bug fix. 10 friends of mine have this problem (PART-#3) will play until 2-5 minutes in then stops to go back to the home screen. (oculus start round future room) All others work (1-2-4) Seems that (hard drive-server is bad) May want to check this unit out.
I felt totally  immersed. Beautifully done. Watched it few times!

What on earth was this. Glad I only paid $3 for it. 
Bad story line. Filming was not good.
And not scary at all.
Piece of advice, save your $3 for something more worth while.
